case_title: ROBERT DUNCAN AS TRUSTEE OF THE ROBERT R. DUNCAN VS. THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES, INC., A et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT DUNCAN AS TRUSTEE OF THE ROBERT R. DUNCAN 2002 LIVING TRUST JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MASON, KESCHA S AN INDIVIDUAL ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES, INC. AND KESCHA S. MASON'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDER TO FILE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO UNITED COUNCIL'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET NO. ONE, REQUESTS NOS. 1-23 AND DEFENDANT KESCHA S. MASONS REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET NO. ONE, REQUESTS NO.3 AND 6. IF PLAINTIFF CONTINUES TO ASSERT THAT HE CAN NEITHER ADMIT NOR DENY ANY OF THESE REQUESTS HE SHOULD INSERT THE LANGUAGE SPECIFIED IN THE CODE WHEN SUCH A RESPONSE IS MADE. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FILE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO KESCHA A. MASON'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION SET NO. TWO. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $600.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID S. ZALOB, ESQ., 415.788.2465, FOR DEFENDANTS THE UNITED COUNSEL OF HUMAN SERVICES, INC. AND KESCHA MASON; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES, INC.'S Motion Compel Further Responses To The United Council Of Human Services, Inc. And Kescha S. Mason'S Requests For Admissions And For Sanctions IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDER TO FILE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO UNITED COUNCIL'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET NO. ONE, REQUESTS NOS. 1-23 AND DEFENDANT KESCHA S. MASONS REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET NO. ONE, REQUESTS NO.3 AND 6. IF PLAINTIFF CONTINUES TO ASSERT THAT HE CAN NEITHER ADMIT NOR DENY ANY OF THESE REQUESTS HE SHOULD INSERT THE LANGUAGE SPECIFIED IN THE CODE WHEN SUCH A RESPONSE IS MADE. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FILE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO KESCHA A. MASON'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION SET NO. TWO. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $600.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
